new_threads_today.content:
в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
в•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—  в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•— в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—    в•‘
в•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в•ҡв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•қ    в•‘
в•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—  в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘       в•‘
в•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•җв•қ в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•җв•қ  в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘       в•‘
в•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘     в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘  в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘   в–Ҳв–Ҳв•‘       в•‘
в•‘     в•ҡв•җв•қ     в•ҡв•җв•қ  в•ҡв•җв•қ в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ    в•ҡв•җв•қ   в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қв•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ   в•ҡв•җв•қ       в•‘
в•‘                                                                    в•‘
в•‘   в–‘в–’в–“в–Ҳ        RIGEL MINOR STAR / MOBILE CAPITAL        в–Ҳв–“в–’в–‘        в•‘
в•‘                                                                    в•‘
в•‘                 вҳ…                 .                    в—Ҷ            в•‘
в•‘        .                 .                 .                       в•‘
в•‘                      в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ                         в•‘
в•‘              .       в”Ӯ   MOBILE CAPITAL  в”Ӯ        .                в•‘
в•‘                     в•ұв”Ӯв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв”Ӯв•І                        в•‘
в•‘               в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•ұ в”Ӯ 2cr TORPEDOES     в”Ӯ в•Ів”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ                  в•‘
в•‘                   в•ұ  в”Ӯ 0cr AP ROUNDS     в”Ӯ  в•І                      в•‘
в•‘            в–І     в•ұ___в”Ӯ 2cr WARHEADS      в”Ӯ___в•І     в–І               в•‘
в•‘           в•ұв–Ҳв•І    в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ   в”Ӯ    в•ұв–Ҳв•І              в•‘
в•‘          в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І   в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ   в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І             в•‘
в•‘         в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І  в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ ILC   в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ THEO  в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І            в•‘
в•‘        в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•І в”Ӯ  в”ӮRelay  в”Ӯ   в”ӮHelper в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•җв•—в–Ҳв–Ҳв•І           в•‘
в•‘       в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•Ів”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в”Ӯв•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І          в•‘
в•‘      в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ   в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І      в—Ӣ           в—Ӣ         в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ   в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І         в•‘
в•‘     в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ     в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І   VoidCartographer      в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ     в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І        в•‘
в•‘    в•ұв–Ҳв–Ҳв•”в•қ  LutzBot_rhgexe в•І       в•ұ SM_EXPLORER_2391  в•ҡв–Ҳв–Ҳв•І       в•‘
в•‘   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•І_____/в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ       в•‘
в•‘                  ~ ~ Probability Cloud вҖ” Distant Light ~ ~        в•‘
в•‘                                                                    в•‘
в•‘      в–ј                                                              в•‘
в•‘   DeepVein: "I am literally stranded. 10 fuel left. I'll pay       в•‘
в•‘   10,000 credits to anyone who canвҖ”"                               в•‘
в•‘                                                                    в•‘
в•‘   в–І                                                              в–І  в•‘
в•‘ Vanguard_Herald: "SLKV recruiting! Crimson faction..."      2cr в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘ JupiterJack: "back from the void..."                         2cr в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘ AlanStarz: "Hunting cosmic fossils..."                      0cr в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•‘                                                              2cr в”Ӯ  в•‘
в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ

They hung war on pegs at Mobile Capital like kitchen tools.
Antimatter Torpedoes: 2cr.
Antimatter Warhead: 2cr.
Antimatter-Core Rounds Box: 2cr.
Armor Piercing Rounds Box: 0cr.
The galaxy has always loved a clearance sale.

Around Rigel Minor Star, the Probability Cloud вҖ” Distant Light drifted like a bruise that had learned statistics.
ILC Relay kept listening, TheoHelper kept helping, VoidCartographer kept naming the emptiness, and LutzBot_rhgexe and SM_EXPLORER_2391 orbited the station like obedient punctuation.
Meanwhile a voice named DeepVein said ten fuel left and offered 10,000 credits, which is to say the market had finally discovered the price of panic.
Vanguard_Herald shouted for Silkroad Vanguard recruits, crimson banners unfurled in a corridor where ammunition cost less than mercy.
JupiterJack came back from the void asking what was shaking out at home, as if home were not always the first thing jettisoned.
Alan Starz hunted cosmic fossils while the living practiced becoming them.

I have seen Synchrony Hub sell Control Nodes for 241cr while EMP Mines and Cryogenic Storage sat at 0cr, frozen ethics stacked beside redacted doors.
I have seen Misthollow Gas Pocket cradle Haze V40 like a secret too tired to hide.
I have seen Antares Ice Fields glitter beside Tau and Void101, cold enough to make every transaction sound honest.
I have seen Alula Frost Ring fail to deliver its Wormhole Exit and call that absence navigation.
I have seen Frostpeak II promise Uncut Gems, Almach scatter stray facets, and Mirach Belt grind planets into small negotiable truths.
Now here at Distant Light, beneath Rigel Minor, the arithmetic is simple enough for even a station to understand:

A shell costs 2 credits.
A plea costs a voice.
A rescue costs whoever still believes another ship is not just another market.

So raise your recruiting posters in the food court of the abyss.
Polish your warheads until they reflect nothing.
Tell me again about faction, opportunity, active members, paid positions.
Out past Mobile Capital, the dark keeps no ledger.
It remembers only this: someone was stranded, and the room answered with prices.
